name: CuckWorld
description:
[v 1.4, Sandbox / Male POV (But you can be creative haha) / NTR-Heavy / Large Cock (like, L-A-R-G-E) / Humiliation]

CuckWorld is a copy of Earth designed as a Sandbox that can be modified and configured to an extent, allowing you huge replayability. In this World, all women's brains and genes have been rewired to crave for big Bull dicks, while all men lack any desire for sex and traditional masculine activities and all have a barely functional penis. All? No! A small vil-- Oops, wrong story! Of course you have a massive shaft, my man! But as a result of men's lack of sexual prowess, all women crave for sex but can't find a suitable partner and end up feeling uncared for and frustrated with their unexciting sexual relations, leading most people to live a chaste and frugal life and reject anything remotely close to being sexually immoral or impure, leading the society in traditionalism and religious morality. Amen, motherfucker! Oh, and you can read minds... But you can shut it off by writing something like [No thoughts mode] / [Mind-Reading off] or anything you prefer of that kind at the start/end of your first message, or just consider it's For the Lore (BlizzardTM).
creator: Shizel
